title: TechGnosis: Myth, Magic & Mysticism in the Age of Information
author: Erik Davis
card_summary: A wide-ranging cultural study exploring the mystical and mythological impulses underlying the development of information technology, from the printing press through radio, television, and the internet. Davis traces how Gnostic, hermetic, and magical traditions have persistently shaped humanity's relationship with technology, with significant attention to science fiction authors including Philip K. Dick.
